subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-09-03
subcodes.first_line: It seems as though all creatures can exist singly and alone. For example, a tree
subcodes.subjects: @the economic problem and its solution; voluntary giving, @maintainance of degrees in society, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @unity; oneness of humanity
